steps.title: Identify what the question needs
steps.content: The question asks which choice most effectively uses information from the notes to specify the test site's climate. The notes state the site has "a subtropic climate with winter rain."

steps.title: Eliminate the choices
steps.content:
• Choice A: Discusses the test's purpose “in a given climate” but never names or describes the actual climate — no specification. ✗
  • Choice B: Describes plant litter and the location (Israel) but says nothing about the climate type. ✗
  • Choice C — ‘a subtropic climate with winter rain’: Directly quotes the climate description from the notes, word for word — fully specifies the climate. ✓
  • Choice D: States a finding about plant litter's positive effect but includes no climate information at all. ✗
That matches choice C — C is correct.
